## Checklist

- [ ] I did not add AI-generated fake classical Chinese.
- [ ] I included a real source for every new classical quote.
- [ ] I avoided taking the quote out of context.
- [ ] I explained why the modern expression and the classical quote match.
- [ ] I ran `pnpm db:seed` if I changed seed data.
- [ ] I ran `pnpm build` if I changed code.
